rows.label: qev087408_MSG0006
rows.name:
Ahh...... Another wrecked Doll got
brought into the garage......[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087408_MSG0007
rows.name:
We're short on parts already...
This one looks pretty bad......[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087408_MSG0001
rows.name:
We need a blue electrical
tentacle to repair that Doll.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087408_MSG0002
rows.name:
They can be harvested from placid duoguills. One's
recently been spotted in the Silent Mire at night,
but watch out for its electrical attacks.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087408_MSG0003
rows.name:
He immediately knew what materials
we'd need, just from a quick
description of the symptoms.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087408_MSG0004
rows.name:
I'm always shocked at how nuanced Commander
Vandham's knowledge of Dolls is.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087408_MSG0005
rows.name:
The only reason we're able to keep
the BLADEs outfitted with Dolls like
this is because he's in charge.[ST:wait ]
